The Egypt international looks like one of the most in-form attacking players in Europe at the moment, scoring 15 goals in 18 games in all competitions so far this season. arts.ttl: Sky Sports PUNDITS are forced to provide commentary for Chelsea vs Aston Villa clash from Anfield - after Stamford Bridge audio cuts out
arts.sum: A major technical hitch at Stamford Bridge led to the audio cutting out, scrambling host David Jones into an impromptu segment live on air.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville explains why Man City's three-goal Feyenoord collapse was WORSE than embarrassing Tottenham defeat for Pep Guardiola's men
arts.sum: Gary Neville believes Man City's 3-3 draw with Feyenoord in midweek will have had a more damaging impact on the team than last weekend's 4-0 loss to Tottenham.

arts.ttl: How forgotten Liverpool star could help secure ELITE Salah replacement
arts.sum: The Georgian international has proven to be a revelation since joining the Italian side in 2022, leading Napoli to the Serie A title in his debut year and establishing himself as one of the standout wingers in world football. But Chiesa has barely featured since his €12m transfer from Juventus, with injuries and fitness struggles limiting the 27-year-old to just 18 minutes of Premier League football so far this season.

arts.ttl: One of Liverpool’s most in-form players could be in danger as Reds eye surprise transfer
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly eyeing up a surprise transfer move for Paris Saint-Germain goalkeeper Gianluigi Donnarumma, despite already having plenty of quality in that position. Donnarumma has undoubtedly had a fine career at the top level in Europe, though his form has arguably dipped a little since he moved from AC Milan to PSG.
